evals.prompt: I need to add a new wallet summary header that exists in mobile and browser surfaces. Where should the contract and implementations live?
evals.expected_output: Use salmon-repo-rules to separate shared semantic contracts from DOM and React Native implementations, recommend packages/shared/src/types/ui for the contract, packages/ui for the DOM implementation, and apps/mobile for the RN implementation.

evals.prompt: Audit the repo for placement mistakes around shared contracts, packages/ui ownership, and mobile-only code leaking into shared packages.
evals.expected_output: Produce a prioritized structural audit that checks shared-vs-app boundaries, DOM-only versus RN-only ownership, and public barrels.
